sentences.target: On visite une villa ce week-end.

translations.fr: On visite une villa ce week-end.
translations.en: We're visiting a villa this weekend.
translations.es: Vamos a visitar una villa este fin de semana.
translations.de: Wir besichtigen am Wochenende eine Villa.
translations.it: Questo fine settimana visitiamo una villa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们这个周末去看一座别墅。
translations.yue: 我哋呢個週末去睇一間別墅。
translations.ru: Мы в эти выходные посмотрим виллу.
translations.pt: Vamos visitar uma vivenda neste fim de semana.
translations.tr: Bu hafta sonu bir villa gezeceğiz.
translations.vi: Cuối tuần này chúng tôi đi xem một biệt thự.
translations.ar: سنزور فيلا في نهاية هذا الأسبوع.
translations.nl: We gaan dit weekend een villa bezichtigen.
translations.hu: Ezen a hétvégén megnézünk egy villát.
translations.hi: हम इस सप्ताहांत एक विला देखने जा रहे हैं।
translations.el: Το Σαββατοκύριακο θα επισκεφτούμε μια βίλα.
translations.nb: Vi skal se på en villa i helgen.
translations.id: Akhir pekan ini kami akan melihat sebuah vila.
translations.sv: Vi ska titta på en villa i helgen.
translations.da: Vi skal se på en villa i weekenden.
translations.ja: 今週末に別荘を見に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun; grammatical 3rd person singular, subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive, takes 'une villa' as direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'villa' as nonspecific.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'visite'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'week-end' to mark a specific time.
Noun, masculine; temporal complement (adverbial) specifying when the visit occurs.

sentences.target: Tu préfères la villa près de la plage.
sentences.reading: /ty pʁe.fɛʁ la vi.la pʁɛ də la plaʒ/

translations.fr: Tu préfères la villa près de la plage.
translations.ipa: /ty pʁe.fɛʁ la vi.la pʁɛ də la plaʒ/
translations.en: You prefer the villa near the beach.
translations.es: Prefieres la villa cerca de la playa.
translations.de: Du bevorzugst die Villa in Strandnähe.
translations.it: Preferisci la villa vicino alla spiaggia.
translations.zh-Hans: 你更喜欢靠近海滩的别墅。
translations.yue: 你比較鍾意近沙灘嗰間別墅。
translations.pt: Você prefere a vivenda perto da praia.
translations.he: אתה מעדיף את הווילה ליד החוף.
translations.tr: Sen sahile yakın villayı tercih ediyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn thích căn biệt thự gần bãi biển hơn.
translations.ar: أنت تفضّل الفيلا القريبة من الشاطئ.
translations.nl: Je geeft de voorkeur aan de villa dicht bij het strand.
translations.uk: Ти віддаєш перевагу віллі біля пляжу.
translations.hu: Jobban szereted a tengerparthoz közeli villát.
translations.hi: तुम्हें समुद्र तट के पास वाली विला ज्यादा पसंद है।
translations.el: Προτιμάς τη βίλα κοντά στην παραλία.
translations.id: Kamu lebih suka vila dekat pantai.
translations.da: Du foretrækker villaen tæt på stranden.
translations.ja: あなたはビーチの近くの別荘が好きです。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'préfères'.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; expresses preference.
Definite article, feminine singular; marks 'villa' as specific/known.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'préfères'.
Adverb forming the multiword prepositional expression 'près de' to indicate proximity.
Preposition linking 'plage' to 'près'; introduces the complement of proximity.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'plage'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'de' in 'près de la plage' (location complement).

sentences.target: Nous louons cette villa pour une semaine.
sentences.reading: /nu lu.wɔ̃ sɛt vi.la puʁ yn sə.mɛn/

translations.fr: Nous louons cette villa pour une semaine.
translations.ipa: /nu lu.wɔ̃ sɛt vi.la puʁ yn sə.mɛn/
translations.en: We're renting this villa for a week.
translations.es: Alquilamos esta villa por una semana.
translations.de: Wir mieten diese Villa für eine Woche.
translations.it: Affittiamo questa villa per una settimana.
translations.ko: 우리는 이 빌라를 일주일 동안 빌려요.
translations.yue: 我哋租呢間別墅一個星期。
translations.ru: Мы снимаем эту виллу на неделю.
translations.pt: Nós alugamos esta vivenda por uma semana.
translations.he: אנחנו שוכרים את הווילה הזו לשבוע.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thuê căn biệt thự này trong một tuần.
translations.ar: نحن نستأجر هذه الفيلا لمدة أسبوع.
translations.nl: We huren deze villa voor een week.
translations.uk: Ми орендуємо цю віллу на тиждень.
translations.hu: Egy hétre kibéreljük ezt a villát.
translations.hi: हम इस विला को एक हफ्ते के लिए किराए पर ले रहे हैं।
translations.el: Ενοικιάζουμε αυτή τη βίλα για μία εβδομάδα.
translations.nb: Vi leier denne villaen i en uke.
translations.id: Kami menyewa vila ini selama satu minggu.
translations.sv: Vi hyr den här villan i en vecka.
translations.ro: Închiriem această vilă pentru o săptămână.
translations.da: Vi lejer denne villa i en uge.
translations.ja: 私たちはこの別荘を一週間借ります。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of 'louons'.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural; transitive, takes 'cette villa' as direct object.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; specifies the noun 'villa'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'louons'.
Preposition introducing a duration/purpose complement.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determines 'semaine'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'pour' (duration complement).

sentences.target: Je veux acheter une villa bientôt.

translations.fr: Je veux acheter une villa bientôt.
translations.en: I want to buy a villa soon.
translations.de: Ich möchte bald eine Villa kaufen.
translations.pt: Quero comprar uma vivenda em breve.
translations.tr: Yakında bir villa satın almak istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn mua một biệt thự sớm.
translations.nl: Ik wil binnenkort een villa kopen.
translations.hi: मैं जल्द ही एक विला खरीदना चाहता हूँ।
translations.el: Θέλω να αγοράσω μια βίλα σύντομα.
translations.nb: Jeg vil kjøpe en villa snart.
translations.id: Saya ingin segera membeli sebuah vila.
translations.sv: Jag vill snart köpa en villa.
translations.ro: Vreau să cumpăr o vilă curând.
translations.da: Jeg vil snart købe en villa.
translations.ja: 私は近いうちに別荘を買いたいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'veux'.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; modal verb selecting the infinitive 'acheter'.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement of 'veux'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determines the object noun 'villa'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'acheter'.
Adverb; temporal modifier of the clause indicating time frame.
